key_results.title: Reduce average new-client time-to-value from 21 days to 14 days
key_results.description: Shorter activation time confirms the onboarding flow is helping clients realize value faster.

key_results.title: Increase onboarding milestone completion rate from 62% to 85%
key_results.description: Higher milestone completion indicates more clients are progressing through the full onboarding path.

key_results.title: Raise 30-day onboarding satisfaction score from 7.1 to 8.5
key_results.description: A stronger early satisfaction score signals that the onboarding experience is becoming more useful and less confusing.

key_results.title: Improve new-client 90-day retention from 88% to 92%
key_results.description: Better early retention confirms the onboarding experience is creating stronger long-term client engagement.

set_rationale: The KR set covers onboarding speed, adoption, experience quality, and downstream retention without repeating the same metric.

confidence.rationale: All four KRs use known onboarding and retention baselines.
